message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

actor "User" as User
participant "DisplayFragment" as DisplayFragment
participant "ReportFragment" as ReportFragment
participant "Report" as Report
participant "Firebase" as Firebase
participant "ReportedFragment" as ReportedFragment

User -> DisplayFragment: Click plus button
DisplayFragment -> ReportFragment: 
User -> ReportFragment: Press a category button
ReportFragment -> Report: 
Report -> Firebase: Report
Report -> ReportedFragment: 
User -> ReportedFragment: Press "Return to Map" button

@enduml
```
